summary: The diff implements a color palette redesign using emerald/teal (oklch hue ~155) as the primary accent across dark, light, amber, cyberpunk, midnight, and ocean themes in frontend/src/index.css, and updates tailwind.config.js color tokens to match. The file-diff is truncated so some themes (cyberpunk, midnight, ocean) and frontend/index.css are not fully visible. Most REQ-1 acceptance criteria appear to be addressed, but one AC cannot be fully confirmed due to truncation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Update the CSS custom properties in frontend/index.css (root-level index.css) for all themes
missing_requirements.reason: The diff only shows changes to frontend/src/index.css. The build request explicitly calls out both frontend/src/index.css AND frontend/index.css, but frontend/index.css does not appear in the modified files list.

missing_requirements.requirement: All six themes (dark, light, amber, cyberpunk, midnight, ocean) use updated color tokens — cyberpunk, midnight, and ocean themes must be confirmed
missing_requirements.reason: The diff is truncated after the amber theme block. The cyberpunk, midnight, and ocean theme definitions are cut off and cannot be verified as implemented with the new palette.
